ca-01.desc: Project scaffold: Go module, cobra CLI, config loader, contentai init basic

ca-09.desc: contentai qa: 7 built-in checks, LLM auto-fix with diff, approval flow

ca-11.desc: Publisher adapters: HTTP+Static, contentai publish with gates

ca-12.desc: contentai social: LLM social copy generation, platform-specific formatting
